config.notice: IMPORTANT: Changing the skill requirements will NOT affect players who have already learned the recipe.
config.enable_logging.title: Enable logging
config.enable_logging.tooltip: Allow log messages to appear in the SMAPI console.
config.minimum_level.tooltip: The minimum level of this skill needed to unlock casks. Set to 0 to disable this skill.
log.requirements_not_met_unlocked: {0} already has the Cask recipe, but current requirements are higher. The recipe will NOT be removed.
